title: Establish the baseline
objective: Validate the current build, Workspace selection, MCP registration, and Dashboard startup.
context:
# Wave 1 — Establish the baseline

The Host confirmed the native contract and repeatable startup path.

## Host judgment
Advance after deterministic schema, store, CLI, API, and Dashboard checks pass.
exit_criteria: Schema, store, CLI/API, and Dashboard startup checks pass.
outcome_summary: Baseline is repeatable and ready for real Team interaction.
gate_note: Host advanced from explicit deterministic evidence.

title: Run the living Agent Team
objective: Exercise the same Mission-scoped Team across implementation, native interaction review, and responsive acceptance.
context:
# Wave 2 — Run the living Agent Team

The baseline passed. Keep Research Engineer and Backend Developer on their existing MemberRuns and provider-native sessions. Integrate completed lanes immediately; QA may remain active into Wave 3.

| Member | Role | Responsibility | Deliverable |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Lead | Integrator | Coordinate decisions and integration | Host decision record |
| Research Engineer | Research | Verify native-session and interaction boundaries | Contract report |
| Backend Developer | Builder | Implement Mission, Team, and Member UX | Patch and browser checks |
| QA Engineer | Reviewer | Verify responsive and navigation journeys | Acceptance report |

## Host judgment
Do not wait for QA to finish unrelated responsive review before integrating the valid implementation. Add Repair only if QA reproduces a defect.
exit_criteria: Mission context renders; long-lived team is observable; member navigation, interactions, and responsive evidence are honest.
plan_note: Carry QA forward if the implementation lanes are ready before responsive review completes.
gate_note: Implementation evidence exists; QA review remains active and may carry forward.

title: Re-plan from live evidence
objective: Carry active QA work forward and add Repair only for a reproducible defect.
context:
# Wave 3 — Re-plan from live evidence

Continue the same TeamRun. QA retains the same assignment and native session from Wave 2. If a real defect is reproduced, add Repair Fixer with a focused correlated assignment.

## Host judgment
Wave advance does not stop the TeamRun or any active provider session.
exit_criteria: Carry-over is explicit; any repair is focused and prior history remains intact.
plan_note: Begin after the Host integrates completed Wave 2 lanes.
